values: Raw idea: Redirect Manager — Sitecore Marketplace client-side app with three extension points (Context Panel, Dashboard Widget per site, Full Page) for CRUD over Redirect Map items at /sitecore/content/{COLLECTION}/{SITE}/Settings/Redirects/* via Authoring GraphQL, with import/export and hybrid usage analytics.
Reference screenshots: Redirect Map item form fields — Type (Server Transfer / 301 / 302 / 307), Preserve QS, Preserve Language, Mapping (regex source -> target rows), Include virtual folder.

notes: Three Marketplace extension points (Context Panel, Dashboard Widget, Full Page) sharing one data layer (Sitecore Authoring GraphQL for rules + Upstash Redis for telemetry).

Hybrid analytics: Upstash via Vercel Marketplace (single shared DB, multitenant by key prefix). Sync of consolidated counter back to Sitecore is DEFERRED to a follow-on PRD so the MVP requires no Sitecore template changes.
MVP defers regex-pattern matching in Context Panel; explicit UI banner required.
Multilingual + versioned CRUD is in scope from MVP; Authoring GraphQL must thread language/version correctly.
Head-app counter increment + 404 reporting is OUT of scope for this product (separate codebase).
Next: /create-prd against this brain-dump. Scope dial to be set at /create-prd kickoff.
